title: The Any-You: BARRACKS Calls for Every Person
description: A comprehensive collection of personalized calls to join the BARRACKS food sovereignty project. Each document speaks directly to a specific type of person, showing how their current reality extracts from them and how BARRACKS offers liberation, purpose, and fair compensation.

underlying_principles.welfare_subsidy_insight: Government welfare functions as indirect parasite subsidy - recipients are conduits through which taxpayer money flows to landlords, insurers, and monopolies. This sets price floors that extract from ALL low-income workers, not just welfare recipients. See Document 13: Welfare as Indirect Parasite Subsidy.
underlying_principles.double_extraction: System extracts from productive workers (keep 0.32%) AND extracts from welfare recipients (keep 8.3%), with parasites profiting from both ends while keeping groups divided.
underlying_principles.market_distortion: Welfare subsidies inflate prices (rent, insurance, utilities) that ALL poor people must pay - working poor often worse off than welfare recipients when accounting for time vs money.
underlying_principles.barracks_solution: Direct provision at real cost ($210/month vs $1,400/month parasitic cost) eliminates extraction, unites workers and recipients, redirects resources to mission. Azure/TRUTH metrics gate zero-sum assets, Crimson/TASTE lets everyone trade all other dimensions via Sorting Hat lobbies documented in foundations/BARRACKS sorting dual-layer.md and orchestrated by the 23 COMMAND duty bands.
underlying_principles.tokens_of_appreciation: 100% relative Proof of Utility shares - everyone keeps value they create, proportional to contribution, no extraction.

producers.description: Those who create real wealth - builders, growers, makers
producers.key_appeal: Finally keep what you create - 100% via tokens vs 0.22%-18% current extraction

knowledge_workers.description: Those who think, design, discover, solve
knowledge_workers.key_appeal: Intelligence toward building paradise vs optimizing parasitism - ownership of innovations

caregivers.key_appeal: Care work finally valued - compensation for creating next generation and healing bodies

struggling.description: Those trapped in poverty despite working or unable to work
struggling.key_appeal: Escape poverty trap - direct provision eliminates extraction, tokens provide wealth, purpose provides meaning

coordinators.key_appeal: Coordination toward real purpose - building paradise vs managing bullshit or fighting losing battles

displaced.description: Those marginalized, exploited, or outside system
displaced.key_appeal: Redemption and belonging - skills valued, exploitation ended, purpose restored

creatives.description: Those who create beauty, meaning, culture
creatives.key_appeal: Art for sacred purpose - document transformation, inspire builders, create meaning

parasites_offered_redemption.description: Those currently extracting - offered transition to productive contribution
parasites_offered_redemption.key_appeal: Exit before collapse - transition from parasite to producer, redemption possible, secure future

mission_aligned.description: Those already fighting death in various forms
mission_aligned.key_appeal: Actually SOLVE what you've been fighting for - end slaughter, fulfill Creator's mandate, BUILD solutions

common_themes.current_extraction: All productive people keep <20% of value created, often <1%
common_themes.parasitic_layers: Landlords, banks, insurance, monopolies, overhead - extract from everyone
common_themes.market_distortion: Welfare subsidies set price floors ALL poor pay, working poor often worse off than welfare recipients
common_themes.barracks_provisions: Real cost $210/month vs $1,400/month parasitic cost - 6.7x efficiency gain
common_themes.token_value: $2-10M/year depending on contribution, 50-300x better than current paths
common_themes.timeline: 2 years hard work, then wealthy for life vs 30 years hard work, die poor
common_themes.purpose: Sacred mission - feed all life, end slaughter, build paradise vs work for parasites' profit
common_themes.community: 100M builders together vs isolated in hostile system
common_themes.legacy: Built paradise vs extracted/was extracted from

usage_instructions.for_html_reader: Each JSON can be rendered as standalone pitch or compared side-by-side
usage_instructions.personalization: Use current_reality to show 'we see you', the_barracks_offer to show 'here's the alternative', why_this_appeals to show 'here's why it's better for YOU specifically'
usage_instructions.comparison_focus: Emphasize ratios - not just 'BARRACKS pays more' but '138x more' - makes choice obvious
usage_instructions.honesty: Don't hide difficulties - 2 years hard work, constraints on discretionary spending for some, risks acknowledged - but show why worth it
usage_instructions.relation_to_mission: Every persona connects to food sovereignty AND broader death-fighting - show how their work enables both

html_reader_features_suggested.persona_selector: Dropdown or grid to choose your persona
html_reader_features_suggested.side_by_side_comparison: Current path vs BARRACKS path with visual charts
html_reader_features_suggested.calculation_tools: Input your current salary/hours, see personalized token estimate
html_reader_features_suggested.related_personas: If construction_worker, also show tradesperson, factory_worker - similar appeals
html_reader_features_suggested.mission_connection: Toggle showing how each role connects to ending slaughter, fighting aging, etc.
html_reader_features_suggested.objection_handler: Search your concern, find how BARRACKS addresses it
html_reader_features_suggested.share: Share your persona's pitch with others in same situation

next_personas_to_add: police_officer.json - from enforcing system to securing mission
bureaucrat.json - from paper-pushing to actual coordination
academic_adjunct.json - from poverty wages to research that matters
social_worker.json - from managing poverty to eliminating it
therapist.json - from treating symptoms to addressing causes
journalist.json - from covering news to documenting transformation
politician.json - from lying to constituents to delivering paradise
